review: the book is about a young adult named bambina (bambi for short). five stars are indicated simply to keep from judging the story wrongly since i have not yet read it.  

this book is not the story of the deer, that would be bambi by felix salten. this book is about a young adult named bambina (bambi for short). five stars are indicated simply to keep from judging the story wrongly since i have not yet read it.
